I am so sorry you are going through this difficult situation with your employer; it takes a lot of courage to speak up against harassment.

━━━ BLOCK 2: HER RIGHTS ━━━
[POSH Act 2013, Section 4] Because your company has 50 employees, they are legally required to have an Internal Complaints Committee (ICC).
[POSH Act 2013, Section 9] You have a three-month window from the date of the complaint to file it.
[POSH Act 2013, Section 11] Your employer cannot take any adverse action against you, like termination, because you have made a complaint.

━━━ BLOCK 3: ACTION TIMELINE ━━━
**Right Now:** Document every instance of harassment with dates, times, and details.
**Today:** Think about what kind of complaint you want to file and gather any supporting evidence you have.

सुप्रीम कोर्ट के फैसले के अनुसार, यह अधिकार पीछे भी लागू होता है।

[CrPC Section 125(2)] अंतिम आदेश आने तक अंतरिम भरण-पोषण का आदेश भी दिया जा सकता है।

━━━ BLOCK 2: HER RIGHTS ━━━
[Dowry Prohibition Act 1961, Section 3] दहेज लेना या देना अपराध है और इसके लिए सज़ा हो सकती है।
[IPC 498A] आपके पति या ससुराल वाले द्वारा आपको क्रूरता का सामना कराना एक गंभीर अपराध है।
[IPC 304B] यदि किसी कारण से आपकी मृत्यु हो जाती है, तो यह दहेज से जुड़े मामलों में एक गंभीर पहलू बन जाता है।

I am so sorry you have been enduring such cruelty from your husband for three years; it must be incredibly painful.

━━━ BLOCK 2: HER RIGHTS ━━━
[Hindu Marriage Act 1955, Section 13] allows you to seek a divorce on grounds of cruelty and desertion.
[CrPC Section 125] permits you to claim maintenance from your husband even while seeking a divorce.

━━━ BLOCK 3: ACTION TIMELINE ━━━
**Right Now:** Start documenting every instance of cruelty you have faced.
